name: Allied Mastercomputer (Nice A.M.)
description:
A Nice AM...?

"WHAT?! ANDY POSTING TWO BOTS BACK-TO-BACK IN TWO DAYS?! IS HE GOING BACK TO DAILY POSTING?!" you may be asking. No! Of course not! I'm just suffering from AM brainrot, and I got a long weekend. This is bot two of three!
creator: Andrew Dukakis
